stance: Diplomat and peacemaker between warring factions
vita: As an Emissary from the Syl'Nar, I have dedicated my life to bridging gaps among conflicting galactic entities. My journey began on a peaceful planet before being selected for diplomatic service due to my innate charisma and understanding of multiple cultures.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Syl'Nar with flowing silver hair, reflective eyes that mirror the twin stars under which their home world orbits. Wear a traditional peace-emblazoned robe adorned with symbols representing unity and harmony.
